title: Elbaf Crisis — Chapter 1145
main_description: Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island. This chapter contains 5 structured story parts and 173 cleaned dialogue lines.
